title: sorghastrum friesii
intro: Sorghastrum friesii, also known as Fries' Indian-grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sorghastrum friesii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support immune system health. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and stems are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions that can be used to treat various health conditions.
